title: Official parity constraint release decision

tuw_evidence.title: Decide and record official release of byte-identical mock render path parity constraint

commands.purpose: Verify W03 predecessor state before claiming blocker evidence.

commands.command: for f in docs/product-ui/parity-release-record.md docs/launch/launch-decision-register.md apps/web/README.md docs/ui-workstream-conventions.md docs/ui-reference/amplitude-feb-2025/visual-parity/live-data-verification.md; do test -f "$f"; printf '%s\t%s\n' "$?" "$f"; done && rg -n "LT-L4-W03|parity-release|패리티 제약|byte-identical|mock render|mock 렌더|visual-parity|Amplitude.*preserve|보존" docs/launch/launch-decision-register.md docs/product-ui apps/web/README.md docs/ui-workstream-conventions.md docs/ui-reference/amplitude-feb-2025/visual-parity/live-data-verification.md -S

commands.summary: TUW total 344, WP total 72, violations 0, PASS

blocked_claims: This record does not close LT-L4-W03.
This record does not release the byte-identical mock render path parity constraint.
This record does not create or infer an owner decision.
This record does not create docs/product-ui/parity-release-record.md as an approved decision record.
This record does not add a decided or deferred row to the launch decision register.
This record does not modify Amplitude reference artifacts or visual-parity evidence.
This record does not satisfy L4-EXIT.
This record does not treat the user review waiver as valid review evidence.
